'''âk-m-g''' ('''kakamag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:header|header]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:header|header]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-m-g
|-
! Lemma
| kakamag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikamag|thikamag]] || [[word:jikamag|jikamag]] || [[word:shikamag|shikamag]] || [[word:kikamag|kikamag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukamag|thuthukamag]] || [[word:jujukamag|jujukamag]] || [[word:shushukamag|shushukamag]] || [[word:kukukamag|kukukamag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukamag|thukamag]] || [[word:jukamag|jukamag]] || [[word:shukamag|shukamag]] || [[word:kukamag|kukamag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukamag|thukamag]] || [[word:jukamag|jukamag]] || [[word:shukamag|shukamag]] || [[word:kukamag|kukamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekamag|thekamag]] || [[word:jekamag|jekamag]] || [[word:shekamag|shekamag]] || [[word:kekamag|kekamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokamag|thothokamag]] || [[word:jojokamag|jojokamag]] || [[word:shoshokamag|shoshokamag]] || [[word:kokokamag|kokokamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokamag|thokamag]] || [[word:jokamag|jokamag]] || [[word:shokamag|shokamag]] || [[word:kokamag|kokamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokamag|thokamag]] || [[word:jokamag|jokamag]] || [[word:shokamag|shokamag]] || [[word:kokamag|kokamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkamag|thĂŠkamag]] || [[word:jĂŠkamag|jĂŠkamag]] || [[word:shĂŠkamag|shĂŠkamag]] || [[word:kĂŠkamag|kĂŠkamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakamag|thathakamag]] || [[word:jajakamag|jajakamag]] || [[word:shashakamag|shashakamag]] || [[word:kakakamag|kakakamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakamag|thakamag]] || [[word:jakamag|jakamag]] || [[word:shakamag|shakamag]] || [[word:kakamag|kakamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakamag|thakamag]] || [[word:jakamag|jakamag]] || [[word:shakamag|shakamag]] || [[word:kakamag|kakamag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakamag|shakamag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakamag|goshakamag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakamag|gokishakamag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakamagnĂŒ|shakamagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakamagnknĂŒ|goshakamagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakamagnĂŒ|gokishakamagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakamagshĂ«|shakamagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakamagnkshĂ«|goshakamagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakamagshĂ«|gokishakamagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakamagro|shakamagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakamagnkro|goshakamagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakamagro|gokishakamagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakamagmu|shakamagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakamagnkmu|goshakamagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakamagmu|gokishakamagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakamagsher|shakamagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakamagnksher|goshakamagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakamagsher|gokishakamagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakamagng|shakamagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakamagnkng|goshakamagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakamagng|gokishakamagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakamagya|shakamagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakamagnkya|goshakamagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakamagya|gokishakamagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakamagyam|shakamagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakamagnkyam|goshakamagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakamagyam|gokishakamagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakamagnĂŒshĂ«|shakamagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakamagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakamagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakamagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakamagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakamagnĂŒro|shakamagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakamagnknĂŒro|goshakamagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakamagnĂŒro|gokishakamagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakamagnĂŒmu|shakamagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakamagnknĂŒmu|goshakamagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakamagnĂŒmu|gokishakamagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakamagshĂ«nĂŒ|shakamagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakamagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakamagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakamagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakamagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakamagshĂ«ro|shakamagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakamagnkshĂ«ro|goshakamagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakamagshĂ«ro|gokishakamagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakamagshĂ«mu|shakamagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakamagnkshĂ«mu|goshakamagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakamagshĂ«mu|gokishakamagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakamagronĂŒ|shakamagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakamagnkronĂŒ|goshakamagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakamagronĂŒ|gokishakamagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakamagroshĂ«|shakamagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakamagnkroshĂ«|goshakamagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakamagroshĂ«|gokishakamagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakamagromu|shakamagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakamagnkromu|goshakamagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakamagromu|gokishakamagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakamagmunĂŒ|shakamagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakamagnkmunĂŒ|goshakamagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakamagmunĂŒ|gokishakamagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakamagmushĂ«|shakamagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakamagnkmushĂ«|goshakamagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakamagmushĂ«|gokishakamagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakamagmuro|shakamagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakamagnkmuro|goshakamagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakamagmuro|gokishakamagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
